title: error.reported event params
description: An out-of-band error notification. Produced by the engine (engine-side errors over the wire) or synthesized by the editor backend (transport/process errors). The error object reuses the provisional error definition from the envelope schema; the full error model (code registry) is formalized in error-model.md in phase C5.

error.description: The reported error, using the shared envelope error object.
